programme.title: Season 1
programme.desc: The pilot outline for "Amores Verdaderos" "Amores Verdaderos pilot introduces Victoria, a successful woman engaged to Armando. She meets José Ángel, a humble gardener, leading to unexpected connections and family conflicts."

programme.title: Consejos de amiga
programme.desc: Niki le pide a su papá q deje su amante. Aníbal visita a Paula y le cuenta la verdad sobré Adriana. Victoria va a una estética con sus amigas y hacen confidencias. Jocelyn quiere q Victoria le preste Arriaga.

programme.title: Citas de guardaespaldas
programme.desc: Niki conoce a Paula y Guzmán le pide q la corra. Ella lo hace pero Paula se niega a renunciar. Niki le pide perdón a su mamá. Guzmán le revela a Niki su secreto. Jacelyn se quiere aprovechar de Arriaga. Victoria los espía.

programme.title: Psicóloga descubierta
programme.desc: Santino visita Beatriz y quiere ayudarla. Victoria destruye la pintura de Arriaga. Guillo muy grosero con su mamá. Guzmán enfrenta a Paula. Guzman descubre a Niki

programme.title: Fiesta sorpresa
programme.desc: Victoria reclama a Arriaga besar a Joselyn. Doris y Joselyn quieren organizar el cumpleaños de Victoria. Candelaria le promete a Cristina visitarla. Nelson hace una fiesta sorpresa para Victoria.

programme.title: Culpa de padres
programme.desc: Anibal sufre por creer q Candelaria murió. Guzmán se sincera con Niki. Paula le reclama a Aníbal por ser un mal padre. Salcero se encuentra con Beatriz en el baile. Kendra quiere ayudar a Nelson a comprar el regalo para Victoria.

programme.title: Season 1
programme.desc: The pilot outline for "Amores Verdaderos" "Amores Verdaderos pilot introduces Victoria, a successful woman engaged to Armando. She meets José Ángel, a humble gardener, leading to unexpected connections and family conflicts."

programme.title: Amenaza de muerte
programme.desc: La psicóloga de Niki es descubierta por Guzmán. Aníbal amenaza al doctor de Adriana. Kendra ofrece trabajo a Cristina. Adriana amenaza al doctor q la atendió.

programme.title: Capítulo 204
programme.desc: Gandia calls out the RBD members for expulsion. Mía tells Franco Miguel's dad died because of him and Miguel came here for revenge. Diego's plans to help the band are revealed. Franco tells Mía that Carlo was responsible for Miguel's dad financial ruin and subsequent death. Simon tells Roberta he has a son. Franco grants Gastón permission to protect Mía from Miguel. Gastón threatens Miguel. Celina has a bulimic scare. Carlo returns to Mexico. Mía confronts Miguel about his revenge; the most explosive scene of their relationship.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 207
programme.desc: Alma tries to make Franco see the truth about Valeria however, her evidence gets ruined. Gastón checks to see if José is registered for next year. Miguel confronts Mía about the money. Franco proposes to Valeria. Gastón continues to harass José. Some of the students things go missing. Celina progresses with the doctor. Miguel struggles with the truth of his father's death. Franco tells Mía he's marrying Valeria in a week. José leaves school. Gastón hits Miguel and Roberta defends him; Gastón chases her down.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 209
programme.desc: Elena comes to Elite Way and tells Miguel the truth about his father's death. Peter tells Mía that the wedding is the next day and to be there for Franco. Mía asks Alma to go with her to the wedding. Elena and Miguel end the conversation with good memories; she tells him who called her to Mexico. Roberta invites Diego into her solitary room. Alma and Mía go to the wedding.

programme.title: Capítulo 210
programme.desc: At the last minute, Valeria refuses to marry Franco. Lupita wants to learn more about her father. Alma visits Franco; he tells her Marina, Mía's mother, is still alive. Mía admits she's saddened that Miguel may leave. Miguel tells the band he's staying at Elite Way. Franco thinks Alma may like him. RBD performs at the concert in the Palacio, real footage is used. León see the band perform. Miguel asks Franco for forgiveness; he forgives and they hug. Roberta tells Simon that it might be better if she left him. León confronts Diego at school about the concert.

programme.title: Capítulo 211
programme.desc: José defends Diego from León. Nico tells his parents he and Lupita are getting married. José, Téo, Nico, and Lupita listen to the message on León phone. Gastón tries to convince Mía to come back to him. Hilda tells Renata not to wait too long or she'll lose Madariaga. Mía identifies the voice of the message as Gastón's. Miguel comes up with a plan to get rid of Gastón and asks Mía to help. Renata kisses Madariaga. Diego hides from his father in Roberta's solitary room. The parents of the RBD members meet with Gandia about them possibly not being allowed in Elite Way next year. Mía asks Gastón to meet for the plan.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Hasta en las más mejores familias
programme.desc: Federica tiene un enamorado secreto. Carmelita Salinas entrevista a Federica y Ludovico Peluche. Federico niega que el hijo de Excelsa sea de él.

programme.title: Viva el Domingo
programme.desc: Federica hace planes para comer con sus papás pero Ludovico muere por ver el fútbol, así que arma una estrategia para regresar temprano a casa. En casa de sus suegros, Ludovico se las ingenia para estar enterado de cómo va el partido.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: El concurso del millón
programme.desc: Arturo participa en un concurso con la finalidad de ser millonario, pero cuando está a punto de ganar el premio mayor, una respuesta equivocada lo arruina todo.

programme.title: Problemas de tubería
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Pedro que mate a la rata que ha invadido su baño. Germán ayuda a Pedro, pero todo se sale de control y hacen un verdadero desastre.

programme.title: La última conquista
programme.desc:
Magdalena, buscando tener otra fuente de ingresos, obliga a Arturo a conseguir otro trabajo
Magdalena, buscando tener otra fuente de ingresos, obliga a Arturo a conseguir otro trabajo además de que ya tiene. Cuando por fin Arturo consigue un nuevo trabajo, se enfrenta a la difícil tarea de decirle a Magdalena, pues sabe que a ella no le gustará la idea de que trabaje de mariachi.
A la par, Silvia se hace de un admirador secreto.
Todo parece ir muy bien, hasta que en su primera cita, Silvia se da cuenta de que su galán no es lo que ella esperaba.

programme.title: La boda de Silvia: Parte I
programme.desc: Silvia está por casarse con Napoleón, pero un par de mujeres interrumpen la boda. Silvia le pregunta a Luis si aún está enamorado ella, pues quiere casarse con él.

programme.title: La boda de Silvia: Parte II
programme.desc:
Todo está listo para que Silvia se case, sin embarto, todo puede pasar
En la recta final de Vecinos, ocurren una serie de sucesos inesperados, Silvia por fin se va a casar con un afamado productor, esto genera que salga a la luz un amor reprimido de uno de los vecinos hacia Silvia, por otra parte lo increíble sucede al ver que Frankie Rivers es contratado para dirigir su propia película. Cuando pensamos que ya nada más asombroso podía suceder, al final de este capítulo nos llevaremos una gran sorpresa.

programme.title: Una patita de conejo fresca
programme.desc: Albertano le manda a María la llave de su cuarto para que saque sus cosas, pero ella entiende le pide que se mude con él, con su llave tiene una pata de conejo de la buena suerte pero al ensuciarse, María la tira y le compra una pata nueva.

programme.title: Sed de agua
programme.desc: Doña Lucha aprovecha el corte de agua en la colonia para vender unas cubetas que tenía apartadas. María se pone celosa de la nueva ayudante del equipo de futbol, Citlali, mientras que Albertano se la pasa en la banca por ser mal jugador.

programme.title: Patadas de ahogada
programme.desc: Es el cumpleaños de Albertano y doña Lucha le organiza una fiesta, María se pinta el cabello y se pone su más lindo vestido para recuperar a Albertano, le dedica canciones compuestas por ella y le recita un poema. Doña Lucha se siente mal.

programme.title: Las palomas
programme.desc: A plague of pigeons arrives at the building and the neighbors fight them off with help from Germán. The López Pérez family runs out of coffee and Arturo must get it from the neighbors.

programme.title: Quédate en casa
programme.desc: The neighbors organize to fight the Coronavirus pandemic. The situation is complicated when someone steals the antibacterial gel from the entrance.

programme.title: El huerto de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa puts a garden in the building, but discovers that someone is stealing her vegetables. Rocko has an intense toothache and doesn't want to go to the dentist.

programme.title: El colchón viejo
programme.desc: Magdalena sells her old mattress to Jorjais, unaware that Arturo keeps his savings there. Cris asks Pedro to formalize their relationship.

programme.title: Los quince años
programme.desc: It is Germán's 15th anniversary working in the building and is celebrated with a party. Frankie Rivers has a creative crisis.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: There is a leak in one of the gas tanks and Germán is in charge of repairing it. Benito has a casting for the Rocky movie.

programme.title: Arturo sastre
programme.desc: Arturo takes out his old sewing machine to dedicate himself to sewing. Vanesa brings a rooster with Alzheimer's into the building that crows all day.

programme.title: El trabajo de Alejandra
programme.desc: The López Pérez need an extra income of money and Alejandra goes out to look for a job. Benito meets a friend from the castings and invites him to the apartment.

programme.title: La gotera
programme.desc: A leak in the López Pérez bathroom causes leaks in Pedro's apartment. Benito and Liz go to a casting for the musical Grease.

programme.title: Mi amiga Virginia
programme.desc: Virginia is left homeless and jobless. Germán decides to give her asylum and she becomes everyone's best friend. Luis signs up for Zumba classes online.

programme.title: Fiesta de casados
programme.desc: Luis feels lonely and Silvia encourages him to organize a meeting in the apartment. Luis invites the married men in the building. Vanesa entrusts Germán with a little bird with behavior problems.

programme.title: San Antonio
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis accidentally break Silvia's San Antonio statue. The López Pérez family complain about the high water consumption in the building.

programme.title: No se peleen
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis fight over Borre's last taco and they stop talking. Vanesa leaves Benito in charge of a cat.

programme.title: El álbum
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis find a photo album in the garbage and through it they remember the best of the worst of the neighbors.

programme.title: Germán por un día
programme.desc: Germán gets sick and the neighbors decide to help him with the building work. Magdalena invents a trip to Paris to show off to her friend.

programme.title: Embarazo
programme.desc: Germán has the task of planting small trees that the mayor's office has given them. Someone in the building is pregnant.

programme.title: ¡Voy a ser papá!
programme.desc: Silvia le confiesa a Luis que está embarazada y él comienza a comprar muchas cosas para el bebé. Magdalena y su familia se vuelven ricos y comienzan a derrochar su dinero.

programme.title: La casa de las Lomas
programme.desc: Magdalena les dice a los vecinos que ella y su familia se mudarán a Las Lomas y le pide a Luis comprarle una mansión.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Morticia, The Writer
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it, he will lose her.

programme.title: Morticia, The Sculptress
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets, a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: Gomez, The Reluctant Lover
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: Feud In The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney, to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: Gomez, The Cat Burglar
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: Portrait Of Gomez
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: Morticia's Dilemma
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter, Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: Christmas With The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fill in for him.

programme.title: Uncle Fester, Tycoon
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: Morticia & Gomez Vs. Fester & Grandmama
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: Fester Goes On A Diet
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Great Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: Ophelia Finds Romance
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: Pugsley's Allowance
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: Happy Birthday, Grandma Frump
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton) comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: Morticia, The Decorator
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: Ophelia Visits Morticia
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it "The Thing."

programme.title: Das Lumpen
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Jealousy, English Style
programme.desc: Green Acres is greener than ever, with jealousy. When Oliver (Eddie Albert) hires a handsome, young, intelligent Brit to take over his farm work while he is away, it doesn't take long for the newcomer to make a strong impression on Lisa (Eva Gabor).

programme.title: Haney's New Image
programme.desc: Mr. Haney is up to his money-making schemes again. When a government representative tells Mr. Haney that the state is looking to purchase the Douglas farm for a new highway, Mr. Haney arranges to buy back the farm from the Douglases at a steal.

programme.title: Alf And Ralph Break Up
programme.desc: Ralph, the lady carpenter, runs away from home and stays with the Douglases after having a fight with her brother, Alf. While Oliver may never get his bedroom finished, he gains a maid as Ralph takes over as the Douglases' live-in housekeeper.

programme.title: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Picking apples while on a picnic, Oliver runs into the feisty Ira Hatch, the owner of the apple orchard. However, once back in town, Mr. Drucker tells Oliver that Hatch has been dead for years. An incredulous Oliver agrees to see a psychologist.

programme.title: Eb Returns
programme.desc: After his elopement and cross-country honeymoon, Eb returns to Hooterville. But his new wife is nowhere to be found! After sending postcards from all across the country, Eb has to confess that his fianc� stood him up at the alter on their big day.

programme.title: Not Guilty
programme.desc: Someone has stolen $300 from Mr. Drucker's general store, and it looks like Eb is the culprit. How else could he have bought himself a new car that cost, you guessed it, exactly $300? But that is just the first twist of the many turns of this story.

programme.title: How To Succeed In TV Without Really Trying
programme.desc: Lisa awakes, saying she's dreamt that she must invest in copper. When Oliver turns that idea down, she seizes on the opportunity to invest in a ten-year-old genius's electric company. Twenty-eight dollars buys her a third of the business.

programme.title: Arnold, Boy Hero
programme.desc: Arnold, the Ziffels' television-loving pig, has taken on a paper route to save enough money for a new color set. But when bank robbers show up and threaten his dreams, and Lisa and Oliver are held captive in their own home, Arnold has to fight back.

programme.title: Flight To Nowhere
programme.desc: The farmers of Hooterville are headed to France! Or at least they are if they can get organized. As part of an agricultural exchange program, the farmers are offered a chance to join a chartered government flight to Europe.

programme.title: My Mother The Countess
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is delighted to learn that her Hungarian mother is planning a visit to their little farm. Much to Oliver's (Eddie Albert) disbelief and dismay, a rumor spreads all around Hooterville that Lisa's mother is a European countess.

programme.title: The Spring Festival
programme.desc: Love is in the air as the first day of spring arrives in Hooterville. And who better to lead the town in celebrating it than Lisa. She is resolved to show Oliver just what spring is all about and sets out to produce a Spring festival celebration.

programme.title: Our Son, The Barber
programme.desc: It's a hair-raising episode as Eb (Tom Lester) enrolls in a correspondence course to become a barber. Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Eddie Albert) give him the money to learn the trade but learning how to cut hair by mail has its glitches.

programme.title: Oliver's Jaded Past
programme.desc: For a lawyer, Oliver should be more careful about what he signs. Lisa reminds him that two years ago Oliver made her a promise to take her back to New York for a two-week vacation. And she has it in writing� on the bottom of the kitchen drawer.

programme.title: The Hungarian Curse
programme.desc: It's hard to know who has a curse over Oliver, but he sure has his hands full with Lisa and her fellow Hungarian Lazlo Broslav. Lazlo appears with a letter claiming he once saved the life of Lisa's uncle, and now her family must repay the debt.

programme.title: The Rutabaga Story
programme.desc: There's a problem in Hooterville: no farmer seems able to grow a cash crop on account of the quality of the soil. But as it turns out from Oliver's (Eddie Albert) soil and mineral research, the oft misunderstood rutabaga is an ideal choice.
